name: Multiplication Mayhem
short_description: Embark on an adventure! Explore Aetheria's floating islands, solve multiplication puzzles, and rescue mythical spirit animals. Uncover secrets and gain magical powers to defeat the Lord of Storms in this educational action-adventure game inspired by Greek mythology.
detailed_description:
Embark on an Enchanting Adventure in Aetheria!


Step into the shoes of an school girl from London, whisked away to the mystical world of Aetheria, a realm of floating islands and ancient secrets. Guided by a wise fairy, you must uncover the truth behind the Orb of Destiny and an ancient prophecy while saving the captured spirit animals from the tyrannical Lord of Storms.

Adventure Awaits!




  • Epic Storyline: Dive deep into the lore of Aetheria, from the Temple of Prophecies to the serene Azure Lakes.
  • Quests & Exploration: Engage in dialogues, embark on quests, and explore five unique areas to uncover the realm's hidden secrets.
  • Save the Spirit Animals: Each freed animal, inspired by Greek mythology, provides valuable buffs and spells to aid you in your journey. Meet Athena the Owl, Ares the Rhinoceros, and other mythical beings at campsites to learn more about the fall of the Lord of Storms and the realm’s mysteries. All characters have unique personalities, and dialogues are fully voiced for an immersive experience.

Action-Packed Challenges!




  • Action Puzzles: Face fast-paced multiplication challenges to free the spirit animals. Each island tests your skills with multiplication tables, where you must quickly choose the correct answer to avoid falling platforms.
  • Buffs & Spells: Use the abilities granted by the saved animals to overcome tougher challenges and progress through the islands.
  • Dynamic Levels: Navigate through 13 islands, each with multiple levels featuring randomized multiplication challenges to keep you on your toes.

Educational & Fun!




  • Integrated Learning: Multiplication is seamlessly woven into the game as a form of foreign magic. Mastering these spells is key to overcoming puzzles and progressing in your adventure.
  • Skill Development: Players will become proficient in multiplication tables from 1 to 12, sharpening their skills through engaging gameplay.
  • Suitable for All Ages: While designed for children learning multiplication, the game’s fast-paced puzzles and deep story will challenge and entertain players of all ages.

Intricate Puzzles!




  • Variety of Challenges: Beyond action puzzles, tackle more relaxing, thought-provoking puzzles such as repowering magical islands or reassembling the ancient prophecy.
  • Multiplication-Based Puzzles: Further hone your multiplication skills with puzzles that require strategic thinking.

Features:


  • Freely Explorable World: Adventure through beautifully crafted islands and uncover the secrets of Aetheria.
  • Immersive Storytelling: Engage with a rich narrative filled with intriguing characters and lore.
  • Challenging Gameplay: Quick-thinking multiplication puzzles that increase in difficulty to challenge even adults.
  • Greek Mythology Influence: Discover spirit animals based on Greek gods, Titans, and mystical creatures, each with unique personalities and fully voiced dialogues.

Join the Adventure!


"Multiplication Mayhem" is more than an educational game – it's an unforgettable adventure filled with action, mystery, and the joy of learning. Are you ready to unlock the secrets of Aetheria and save the spirit animals?

Wishlist now to embark on your Mathematical odyssey and transform the way you learn multiplication forever!
